title: BLIF frontend does not honor reversed order of port bit indices

features.name: port declaration with reversed indices (msb < lsb)
features.description: Code should include a module port declared with reversed indices where msb is less than lsb, such as input wire [0:3] instead of input wire [3:0]

features.name: named port connection with concatenation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation using named port connections where a concatenation expression is connected to a multi-bit port

features.name: blackbox module with reversed port indices
features.description: Code should include a blackbox module where a multi-bit input port has reversed indices [0:N] instead of [N:0]
